Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class LineEquipmentListEvidence.LineItem

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.LineEquipmentListEvidence.LineItem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
LineEquipmentListEvidence
public static final class LineEquipmentListEvidence.LineItem extends Object implements Serializable
One extracted line-list row.

  • Constructor Details

    • LineItem

      public LineItem(String lineId, String fromTag, String toTag, double nominalDiameterInches, double internalDiameterM, double wallThicknessM, double lengthM, String pipeClass, String material)
      Creates a line item.
      Parameters:
      lineId - line id or line number
      fromTag - upstream node or equipment tag
      toTag - downstream node or equipment tag
      nominalDiameterInches - nominal pipe size in inches
      internalDiameterM - internal pipe diameter in m
      wallThicknessM - wall thickness in m
      lengthM - segment length in m
      pipeClass - piping class or PCS id
      material - material grade or MDS basis

  • Method Details

    • getLineId

      public String getLineId()
      Gets line id.
      Returns:
      line id

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts line item to a map.
      Returns:
      ordered map representation
